input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.10.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.10.3
            TITLE: industrial engine

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.10.3: Industrial Engine
IN.10.3 Industrial Engine 
An engine which, according to the manufacturers’ specifications and without the required 
restrictor, is capable of producing 5 hp per 100 cc or less.  
Submit a Rules Question to request approval of an Industrial Engine.

final_answer: Industrial Engine An engine which, according to the manufacturers’ specifications and without the required restrictor, is capable of producing 5 hp per 100 cc or less. Submit a Rules Question to request approval of an Industrial Engine.
